Strategy: Schedule seasonal merchandising and promotion windows
Knowledge rule: Month effects reveal recurrent seasonality in purchase intention.

Strategy: Reduce exit friction in product and checkout journeys
Knowledge rule: High exit rates reveal journey breakpoints that suppress conversion.

Strategy: Trigger product-page assistance for long comparison sessions
Knowledge rule: Long product-page duration suggests comparison effort and need for decision support.

Strategy: Improve first-screen relevance and loading quality
Knowledge rule: High bounce rates indicate weak landing-page match or slow first interaction.

Strategy: Personalize product discovery depth and recommendations
Knowledge rule: Product-page count captures browsing depth and product discovery intensity.

Strategy: Personalize journeys by visitor recency type
Knowledge rule: Visitor type separates returning, new, and other sessions with different intent patterns.
Administrative dwell time reflects account, policy, or support friction.

Strategy: Reweight acquisition channels by conversion quality
Knowledge rule: Traffic source patterns indicate channel quality and targeting mismatch.
